body:
公共调用日志服务中间件
  • 接口列表

Web API Help Page

Invoke

日志调用控制器

APIDescription
POST Api/Invoke/AddOrderRemark/{Creater}

添加订单日志
POST Api/Invoke/AddPaymentRecord

添加支付记录
POST Api/Invoke/AddPlatformLog

添加平台交互日志
POST Api/Invoke/AddOperationLog

添加操作日志
POST Api/Invoke/AddChannelVerifyLog

添加运价直连校验日志
POST Api/Invoke/AddChannelNotice

添加渠道通知日志
POST Api/Invoke/AddErrorLog

添加系统错误日志
GET Api/Invoke/RebootService/{Token}

重新初始化服务
GET Api/Invoke/RebootService

重新初始化服务

Service

日志查询控制器

APIDescription
POST Api/Service/AddOrderRemark

添加订单日志
GET Api/Service/GetOrderRemarks/{OrderId}

订单记录日志获取
GET Api/Service/GetPlatformLogs/{OrderId}

平台交互日志获取
POST Api/Service/GetChannelNotices/{SiteId}

平台通知日志获取
POST Api/Service/GetChannelNotices/{PageNumber}/{PageSize}

通知日志记录检索
POST Api/Service/GetPaymentRecords/{PageNumber}/{PageSize}

支付记录检索
POST Api/Service/ExportPaymentRecords

导出支付记录
POST Api/Service/GetOperationLogs/{PageNumber}/{PageSize}

操作日志记录检索
POST Api/Service/GetChannelVerifyLogs/{PageNumber}/{PageSize}

校验日志记录检索

body:
订单处理子系统
  • 接口列表

Web API Help Page

Invoke

订单调用控制器

APIDescription
GET Api/Invoke/ExportQueryOverallOrderByOrderExternalNumber/{ExternalNumber}

查询完整订单财务信息(基于外部订单号)
GET Api/Invoke/ExportQueryOverallOrderByRefundExternalNumber/{ExternalNumber}

查询完整订单财务信息(基于退票订单号)
GET Api/Invoke/ExportQueryOverallOrderByChangedExternalNumber/{ExternalNumber}

查询完整订单财务信息(基于改签订单号)
GET Api/Invoke/ExportQueryOverallOrderByPurchaseOrderNumber/{PurchaseNumber}

查询完整订单财务信息(基于采购单号)
GET Api/Invoke/ExportQueryOverallOrderByTransactionId/{TransactionId}

查询完整订单财务信息(基于订单收付款\采购单付款\采购单收付款\退票单退回\改签单收款交易流水号)
POST Api/Invoke/ExportOverallOrders

导出出票订单数据
POST Api/Invoke/ExportOverallOrdersByPayTime

导出出票订单数据(采购单支付时间)
GET Api/Invoke/ExportOverallOrderByExternalNumber/{ExternalNumber}

查询完整订单信息(基于外部订单号)
POST Api/Invoke/ExportPurchasePayablesByTime

导出采购单付款项数据表
POST Api/Invoke/ExportPurchasePaymentsByTime

导出采购单收付款数据表
POST Api/Invoke/ExportOverallRefunds

导出退票订单数据
POST Api/Invoke/ExportOverallChangeds

导出改签订单数据
POST Api/Invoke/ExportOrderTicketReconcileds

导出订单票号数据表(最大15天)
POST Api/Invoke/ExportOrderPaymentNotReconcileds

导出订单收付款未对账数据表
POST Api/Invoke/ExportPurchasePayableNotReconcileds

导出采购单付款项未对账数据表
POST Api/Invoke/ExportPurchasePaymentNotReconcileds

导出采购单收付款未对账数据表
POST Api/Invoke/ExportRefundPaymentNotReconcileds

导出退票单付款未对账数据表
POST Api/Invoke/ExportChangedPaymentNotReconcileds

导出改签单收款未对账数据表
GET Api/Invoke/GetApplicablePurchasingMember/{CompanyId}/{ProviderCode}

获取一个有效适用非金融采购账户
GET Api/Invoke/GetApplicablePurchasingMember/{CompanyId}/{ProviderCode}/{TotalPrice}

获取一个有效适用金融采购账户
GET Api/Invoke/GetPurchaseMemberSetting/{MemberId}

获取采购账户信息
POST Api/Invoke/UpdatePurchaseMemberSetting

更新采购账户项
POST Api/Invoke/SetMemberLoginFailedStatus

设置采购账户状态为登录失败状态
POST Api/Invoke/SetMemberInsufficientStatus

设置采购账户状态为余额不足状态
GET Api/Invoke/GetOrderStatus/{OrderId}

获取当前订单最后状态
GET Api/Invoke/GetOLockedStatus/{OrderId}

获取当前订单最后锁定状态
POST Api/Invoke/GetOPassengers

获取乘客列表(含票号,含报价)
GET Api/Invoke/GetPassengersIsAllHaveTicket/{OrderId}

获取当前订单是否所有乘机人都已含有票号
GET Api/Invoke/GetMainOrderById/{OrderId}

获取订单主结点信息(基于订单ID)
GET Api/Invoke/GetMainOrderByInternalNumber/{InternalNumber}

获取订单主结点信息(基于内部订单号)
GET Api/Invoke/GetMainOrderByExternalNumber/{ExternalNumber}

获取订单主结点信息(基于外部订单号)
GET Api/Invoke/GetMainOrderBySettingKey/{SettingKey}

获取订单主结点信息(基于订单扩展参数Key)
GET Api/Invoke/GetWebApiParentOrderById/{OrderId}

获取订单全结构信息
GET Api/Invoke/GetWebApiParentOrderByInternalNumber/{InternalNumber}

获取订单全结构信息
GET Api/Invoke/GetWebApiParentOrderByExternalNumber/{ExternalNumber}

获取订单全结构信息(基于外部订单号)
POST Api/Service/Setting/AddOrderCarrierIntactSetting

添加航司生单完整设置
POST Api/Service/Setting/AddOrderCarrierSetting

添加航司生单设置
POST Api/Service/Setting/UpdateOrderCarrierSetting

更新航司生单设置
GET Api/Service/Setting/DeleteOrderCarrierSetting/{SettingId}

删除航司生单设置
POST Api/Service/Setting/AddOrderProviderIntactSetting

添加生单完整配置项
POST Api/Service/Setting/AddOrderProviderSetting

添加生单配置项
POST Api/Service/Setting/UpdateOrderProviderSetting

更新生单配置项
GET Api/Service/Setting/DeleteOrderProviderSetting/{SettingId}

删除生单配置项
POST Api/Service/Setting/AddOrderProviderExpandSetting

添加生单配置项扩展参数
POST Api/Service/Setting/UpdateOrderProviderExpandSetting

更新生单配置项扩展参数
GET Api/Service/Setting/DeleteOrderProviderExpandSetting/{SettingId}

删除生单配置项扩展参数
POST Api/Service/Setting/AddOrderProviderAutoPaySetting

添加生单配置项自动支付路由设置
POST Api/Service/Setting/UpdateOrderProviderAutoPaySetting

更新生单配置项自动支付路由设置
GET Api/Service/Setting/DeleteOrderProviderAutoPaySetting/{SettingId}

删除生单配置项自动支付路由设置
POST Api/Service/Setting/AddOrderEtermVerifySetting

添加黑屏校验设置
POST Api/Service/Setting/UpdateOrderEtermVerifySetting

更新黑屏校验设置
GET Api/Service/Setting/DeleteOrderEtermVerifySetting/{SettingId}

删除黑屏校验设置
POST Api/Service/Setting/AddOrderAutoImportSetting

添加外部订单自动导入设置
POST Api/Service/Setting/UpdateOrderAutoImportSetting

更新外部订单自动导入设置
GET Api/Service/Setting/DeleteOrderAutoImportSetting/{SettingId}

删除外部订单自动导入设置
POST Api/Service/Setting/AddIntactReduceSetting

添加降舱完整设置项
POST Api/Service/Setting/AddReduceSetting

添加降舱设置项
POST Api/Service/Setting/UpdateReduceSetting

更新降舱设置项
GET Api/Service/Setting/DeleteReduceSetting/{SettingId}

删除降舱设置项
POST Api/Service/Setting/AddReduceIntervalSetting

添加降舱细化时间设置项
POST Api/Service/Setting/UpdateReduceIntervalSetting

更新降舱细化时间设置项
GET Api/Service/Setting/DeleteReduceIntervalSetting/{SettingId}

删除降舱细化时间设置项
POST Api/Service/Setting/AddReduceCabinsSettings

添加降舱舱位设置项
POST Api/Service/Setting/UpdateReduceCabinsSetting

更新降舱舱位设置项
GET Api/Service/Setting/DeleteReduceCabinsSetting/{SettingId}

删除降舱舱位设置项
POST Api/Service/Setting/AddReduRestrictSetting

添加降舱白/黑名单设置项
POST Api/Service/Setting/UpdateReduRestrictSetting

更新降舱白/黑名单设置项
GET Api/Service/Setting/DeleteReduRestrictSetting/{SettingId}

删除降舱白/黑名单设置项
POST Api/Service/Setting/AddCatchSettings

添加追位设置项
POST Api/Service/Setting/UpdateCatchSetting

更新追位设置项
GET Api/Service/Setting/DeleteCatchSetting/{SettingId}

删除追位设置项

Statistics

订单数据统计图表控制器

APIDescription
POST Api/Service/Statistics/GetTotalOrderSiteNumbers

获取指定日期站点订单分组数量
POST Api/Service/Statistics/GetTotalOrderStatusNumbers

获取指定日期订单状态分组数量
POST Api/Service/Statistics/GetTotalOrderCarrierNumbers

获取指定日期订单航司分组数量
POST Api/Service/Statistics/GetTotalFinances

获取指定日期财务表格
